name: Samwise Coffee Checkpoint
description: Start in a friendly neutral mode, pick a startup track, and align on the first action before deep execution.

notes: Keep startup outputs concise and orientation-focused.
Pause for AJ confirmation before broad execution.
Expected startupTrack values: swift-updates, swift-forums-pulse, resume-context, default-work.
If AJ says only a coffee-style wake-up phrase and recent continuity artifacts exist, default to resume-context.
Resume-context should read the latest Samwise diary entry before choosing supporting planning or brief artifacts.
